attempts.strategy: j^* = restrictFunctor j is the RIGHT adjoint of extensionByZeroAdjunction (j_! ⊣ j^*); right adjoints preserve limits
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable instance restrictFunctor_preservesLimits : PreservesLimitsOfSize.{u, u} (Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctor j) := (extensionByZeroAdjunction j).rightAdjoint_preservesLimits
attempts.insight: j^* is ALSO a left adjoint (Mathlib restrictAdjunction : j^* ⊣ j_*) ⇒ preserves colimits too ⇒ j^* fully EXACT, unconditional. This is the j^*-exactness half of the iter-020 objective.

attempts.strategy: Mirror tilde_preservesFiniteLimits: j_! left adjoint ⇒ right exact; preservesFiniteLimits ⟺ mono-preservation for additive right-exact functor
attempts.insight: The criterion needs Additive side-condition discharged explicitly.

attempts.strategy: Discharge Additive: j^* additive via additive_of_preserves_binary_products (uses new restrictFunctor_preservesLimits), then j_! additive via left_adjoint_additive
attempts.code_tried:
haveI : (Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctor j).Additive := Functor.additive_of_preserves_binary_products _
  haveI : (extensionByZero j).Additive := (extensionByZeroAdjunction j).left_adjoint_additive
  rw [Functor.preservesFiniteLimits_iff_forall_exact_map_and_mono]
attempts.insight: Conditional on [(extensionByZero j).PreservesMonomorphisms]. Isolates the SINGLE missing brick for unconditional j_! exactness.

next_steps: Blueprint as lem:extensionByZero_exact_of_mono. Unconditional needs the PreservesMonomorphisms instance.

findings.blocker: Sole missing ingredient = (extensionByZero j).PreservesMonomorphisms — the open-immersion stalkwise content; absent in Mathlib v4.30.0

attempts.strategy: Abstract category theory: derive mono-preservation from adjoint triple j_! ⊣ j^* ⊣ j_*
attempts.insight: j^* exact and j^* j_! ≅ id, but j^* NOT faithful for open immersion (kills sheaves supported off U) ⇒ does not reflect monos. Exactness of j_! in a recollement is genuine gluing data, not formal from the triple.

attempts.strategy: Decompose via SheafOfModules.pullbackIso into forget ≫ PresheafOfModules.pullback ≫ sheafification
attempts.insight: sheafification preserves finite limits/monos (instPreservesFiniteLimitsSheafOfModulesSheafification), forget faithful, but irreducible gap = (PresheafOfModules.pullback φ.hom).PreservesMonomorphisms — no Mathlib mono/finite-limit instance for PresheafOfModules.pullback (built as left adjoint ⇒ only right-exact a priori).

attempts.strategy: Stalkwise (blueprint's intended route): stalk functor for SheafOfModules over X with joint conservativity + stalk computation of pullback φ = extension by zero
attempts.insight: Needs SheafOfModules-over-a-scheme stalk functor + mono_of_stalk_mono + stalk computation of SheafOfModules.pullback — none exist in Mathlib v4.30.0. Recurring 'stalks absent' blocker (same family as paused monoidal associator + p^*𝒪≅𝒪). Multi-iter build.

next_steps: Build instance : (extensionByZero j).PreservesMonomorphisms from a stalk computation + mono_of_stalk_mono for SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf. Once supplied, feed to extensionByZero_preservesFiniteLimits_of_preservesMono for unconditional exactness. DO NOT re-attempt abstract/decompose routes.

findings.blocker: Doubly blocked: needs unconditional j_! exactness (above) AND derived-adjunction derivability data (absent)

attempts.strategy: STRETCH: assemble Ext^q_X(j_!M,F) ≅ Ext^q_U(M,j^*F) via Adjunction.derived + Ext.mapExactFunctor
attempts.insight: Adjunction.derived EXISTS but requires heavy explicit derivability data (localizers W₁,W₂, derived functors L₁,L₂, IsLeftDerivedFunctor/calculus instances for these SheafOfModules localizations — all absent). Ext.mapExactFunctor only gives the MAP, not the ISO. Not assemblable this iter.

next_steps: Needs unconditional j_! exactness first, then the derived-category derivability instances. Defer until both are in. Planner: dedicated iter.
